content: The working memory capacity limits that bound LLM reasoning can be actively mitigated by re-calibrating the 2025-generation configurable ICM curiosity mechanism to prioritize exploration of memory chunks that fall just outside the agent's current working memory upper bound, rather than chasing any random novel state. This creates an intrinsic reward gradient that progressively stretches the agent's effective working memory for long-horizon reasoning by encouraging structured, incremental expansion rather than unguided novelty-seeking.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
